title: Will there be more than 25 transit calls through the Strait of Hormuz from Jun 8 to Jun 14, 2026?

current.lean_note: I lean NO (my prob 42%) but it isn't +EV at the ask — no value bet (betting the other side would contradict my forecast).
current.rationale_summary: The Jun 8-14 week ran at near-zero commercial transits after the Jun 10-11 IRGC hard closure, but IMF PortWatch counts traffic broadly (both directions, naval) and the prior three weeks all resolved in the 25-49 range, leaving real uncertainty whether the total clears 25.
